title: Seals
body:
This mod adds (my favorate animal) SEALS!!!! Becareful as this mod does not naturaly spawn them yet you have to use the command "/give @s spamco_seals:seal_spawn_egg" to get the spawn egg.

They follow you when you hold salmon and that's about it for now, this is planned to change sooner or later.

this isnt planned for lots of versions of minecraft mainly because I don't know how to update mods but if I get a single message at my discord(valli_2221) asking for it to be updated to 1.20.X I will probably.

also because of modrinth rules you have to ask to put peoples mod into modpacks this is me saying you can no need to ask.
